summary: Round 4 audited API input validation (security), silent catches and error consistency (quality), Date allocations and context memoization (performance), and duplicated code / dead exports (DX). 26 of 35 actionable fixes were applied across 4 agents. Security agent added Zod safeParse to 8 unvalidated API routes (comments, sections, templates, task comments) with 4 new schemas in core/types.ts. Quality agent logged 5 silent catches, replaced 4 generic Error throws with ValidationError/NotFoundError, and migrated 3 modules to structured createLogger. DX agent extracted fetchWithTimeout to shared utility, centralized Ollama base URL, and removed 3 dead exports. Performance agent created useToday.ts hook but FAILED to wire it into TaskItem.tsx, Today.tsx, or SettingsContext.tsx — the 3 highest-priority perf fixes (PERF-401, PERF-402, PERF-407) are claimed as fixed in the report but the code changes were never applied. useToday.ts is orphaned dead code. Tests: 2469 passing (202 files). Typecheck: clean. Lint: 0 errors, 71 pre-existing warnings.

failures.description: SettingsContext.Provider value useMemo — claimed fixed but no useMemo exists in the file. Fix was NOT applied.
TaskItem Date allocation — claimed fixed with useToday() but line 88 still uses new Date(). Fix was NOT applied.
Today.tsx date allocations — claimed fixed with useToday() but line 59 still uses toDateKey(new Date()). Fix was NOT applied.
src/ui/hooks/useToday.ts was created but never imported anywhere — dead code.

focus_next_round: Wire useToday.ts into TaskItem.tsx, Today.tsx, Board.tsx, and other components with new Date() in render path (complete PERF-401/402/407)
Apply SettingsContext useMemo (PERF-401) — broadest impact context re-render fix
Validate remaining unvalidated API routes: tasks/reorder, tasks/import, tasks/relations, bulk/update, settings value, plugin RPC (R4-09 through R4-14)
Address 106 silent catch blocks — triage top-6 offender files (useAppState, PluginContext, piper-local-tts)
Consider PERF-301 batch settings endpoint to replace 52 individual API calls
